reviews.review_title: Unique Room Escape, Epic Art Style
reviews.review_description:
Took me about an hour to finish solo, but I bet it would have taken similar even with 3 buddies.  It's a trippy, awesome little indie title that shouldn't be missed.

If I had made this game, I'd be so proud.  I hope we see more in this rodent universe.

This game is challenging, entertaining and funny as hell.  Had a blast playing this and for the price it’s a steal.  I would recommend this game for anyone wanting a good escape room experience with a friend. Aside from the actual escape part of the game there is plenty going on to keep you smiling and happy.  Hats off to the developer for making this.  Keep up the good work.

reviews.review_title: A masterpiece of an escape room
reviews.review_description: An absolute masterpiece of an escape room. One of the best multiplayer experiences I’ve had on the Oculus. If you like escape rooms and/or puzzles, this is a must own! I don’t know how this isn’t on the official store with more reviews!
Absolutely amazing experience, great mechanics, even better story. Everyone must try it.
